title: stipa pennata subsp. tirsa
intro: Stipa pennata subsp. tirsa, also known as golden oats or golden feather grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The golden oats can be prepared as herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
